TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ke-s-mu, title = Ke-s-mu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ke-s-mu} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ke-s-mu "A-la-pow a kamu ōßŔĄōģōĪō∑ŔąŔÖ‚Äé al-KharŠĻ≠Ňęm, kamu nipabelin Ke-s-mu" nu Su-tan kung-hee-kow a angangan. makayzaay U-kan-taay a Ni-low-he atu makayzaan I-su-pi-yaay a Cin-ni-low-he itini a makakutay, pasayamis belud pasay Ay-ci atu mulaliw micumud tu Ti-cong-hey. "Ke-s-mu" cacay ku kamu u imi zu a cihek. Ke-s-mu a kitizaan iza ku100 emang ku muenengay nu tademaw, micapi tu saamisan nu Ke-s-mu atu En-tu-man a nisakaput nu tabakiay a tukay u tademaw hakay macaliway tu 400 a emang. likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Ke-s-mu i 1821 a mihcaan u Ay-ci atu Mu-han-mu-te.A-li-pow-sya patizeng tu tukay, mala nu Ay-ci a hitay a katukuhan. nika zikuz balaki pasu tubang patahkal kitizaan sapisiwbaynu angangan. 1884 a mihca 3 a bulad 13 a dimiad, paicelang tu Mu-han-mu-te.Ay-ha-man-te.Ma-he-ti sakaput a hitay mitaliyuk tu nu Ing-kow sakakaay nu mikeliday ci Ca-li.cyaw-ce.ke-ten mikelid mipupu tu hitay, zikuz sakay tiniay a tukay nu Ing-Ay pulung nu hitay sebek amipatay. 1885 a mihca 1 a bulad 26 a ddimiad, mapelpelay a Ke-s-mu mangayaw. zikuz I 1898 a mihca 9 a bulad 2 adimiad, ci He-pow-te.Ci-ci-le mikelid tu Ing a hitay mademe t uku misebengay nu Ma-he-ti-pay a hitay. 1885ŚĻī1śúą26śó•, . 1899 a mihcaan, Ke-s-mu mala nu Ing-Ay-Su-tan angangan nu tukay. i 1956 a mihcaan sateked mala nu Su-tan zikuz mala uyni angangan nu kanatal. 1899ŚĻī, . hekalŚúįÁźÜ Ke-s-mu tini i Su-tannu macelcelay nu tademaw a kakitizaan nu teban, mahamin itini a kanatal nu Walian saamisan angangan, pey-wi15 katukuh 16 tu, tung-cin 31 katukuh 32 tu. Ke-s-mu a dimiad u akuti'ay a alikelikenan, pitu a bulad atu walu a bulad taneng mahapinang maazih ku kasinanum. Ke-s-mu palalecad paymihcaan kasinanum macaliway ku 155 haw-mi. tini I mihcaan palalecad tu bali nu akuti', Ke-s-mu u sataledesay nu tabakiay a tukay. kalaludan akuti' hakay a macaliway ku 53ňöC "127ňöF". mihcaan palalecad satalakaway akuti' nu lahud 37.1ňöC "99ňöF". namahiza nayay ku cacanan palalecad tu nu buladay a akuti' isasa tu 30ňöC "86ňöF". uyni caay henay kaazih zumaay angangan akuti' ku likelikenan demiad nu tukay Li-ya-te, Pa-ke-ta-atu Bung-hwang a tukay mahiniay. u akuti' i labii mahapinang maselep ku akuti', Ke-s-mu palalecad saisasaay a lahud a didi' ku akuti'. Ke-s-mu iza ku Su-tan satabakiay a pahikukia. nu Su-tanay a pibahelan nu angangan a kasaupuan kaliwsasakan a kitizaan. nauyaanay patizeng i Ke-s-mu nu satimulan, nika kilul tu kalamkam kacakat nu tukay atu capiay a kitizaan masatukuyay pahikukian mala u angangan tu nu iciba. baluhay kanatal a pihikukian imahini i En-tu-man a nipatizengan. a mikutay ciniza tu nu ayzaay a Ke-s-mu kanatal a pahikukian mala nu Su-tan nu satabakiay a pahikukian. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == k…ô-s-mu "a-r~…ĺa-pow a kamu ******** ar~…ĺ-kńßar**m, kamu nipab…ôr~…ĺin k…ô-s-mu" nu su-tan kuŇč-ńß…ô…ô-kow a aŇčaŇčan. makajzaaj u-kan-taaj a ni-r~…ĺow-ńß…ô atu makajzaan i-su-pi-jaaj a ¶in-ni-r~…ĺow-ńß…ô itini a makakutaj, pasajamis b…ôr~…ĺud pasaj aj- ¶i atu mur~…ĺar~…ĺiw mi ¶umud tu ti- ¶oŇč-ńß…ô. "k…ô-s-mu" ¶a ¶aj ku kamu u imi zu a ¶ińß…ôk. k…ô-s-mu a kitizaan iza ku*** …ômaŇč ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj nu tad…ômaw, mi ¶api tu saamisan nu k…ô-s-mu atu …ôn-tu-man a nisakaput nu tabakiaj a tukaj u tad…ômaw ńßakaj ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu *** a …ômaŇč. r~…ĺikisi ** k…ô-s-mu i **** a mińß ¶aan u aj- ¶i atu mu-ńßan-mu-t…ô.a-r~…ĺi-pow-sja patiz…ôŇč tu tukaj, mar~…ĺa nu aj- ¶i a ńßitaj a katukuńßan. nika zikuz bar~…ĺaki pasu tubaŇč patańßkar~…ĺ kitizaan sapisiwbajnu aŇčaŇčan. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a dimiad, pai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu mu-ńßan-mu-t…ô.aj-ńßa-man-t…ô.ma-ńß…ô-ti sakaput a ńßitaj mitar~…ĺijuk tu nu iŇč-kow sakakaaj nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj ¶i ¶a-r~…ĺi. ¶jaw- ¶…ô.k…ô-t…ôn mik…ôr~…ĺid mipupu tu ńßitaj, zikuz sakaj tiniaj a tukaj nu iŇč-aj pur~…ĺuŇč nu ńßitaj s…ôb…ôk amipataj. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a ddimiad, map…ôr~…ĺp…ôr~…ĺaj a k…ô-s-mu maŇčajaw. zikuz i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * adimiad, ¶i ńß…ô-pow-t…ô. ¶i- ¶i-r~…ĺ…ô mik…ôr~…ĺid tu iŇč a ńßitaj mad…ôm…ô t uku mis…ôb…ôŇčaj nu ma-ńß…ô-ti-paj a ńßitaj. **********, . **** a mińß ¶aan, k…ô-s-mu mar~…ĺa nu iŇč-aj-su-tan aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj. i **** a mińß ¶aan sat…ôk…ôd mar~…ĺa nu su-tan zikuz mar~…ĺa ujni aŇčaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ. *****, . ńß…ôkar~…ĺ** k…ô-s-mu tini i su-tannu ma ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺaj nu tad…ômaw a kakitizaan nu t…ôban, mańßamin itini a kanatar~…ĺ nu war~…ĺian saamisan aŇčaŇčan, p…ô-wi** katukuńß ** tu, tuŇč- ¶in ** katukuńß ** tu. k…ô-s-mu a dimiad u akuti Ē~ °aj a ar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan, pitu a bur~…ĺad atu war~…ĺu a bur~…ĺad tan…ôŇč mańßapinaŇč maazińß ku kasinanum. k…ô-s-mu par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad pajmińß ¶aan kasinanum ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ku *** ńßaw-mi. tini i mińß ¶aan par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu bar~…ĺi nu akuti Ē~ °, k…ô-s-mu u satar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj nu tabakiaj a tukaj. kar~…ĺar~…ĺudan akuti Ē~ ° ńßakaj a ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ku *** ¶ "****f". mińß ¶aan par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad satar~…ĺakawaj akuti Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺańßud **.** ¶ "***f". namańßiza najaj ku ¶a ¶anan par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu nu bur~…ĺadaj a akuti Ē~ ° isasa tu *** ¶ "***f". ujni ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kaazińß zumaaj aŇčaŇčan akuti Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan d…ômiad nu tukaj r~…ĺi-ja-t…ô, pa-k…ô-ta-atu buŇč-ńßwaŇč a tukaj mańßiniaj. u akuti Ē~ ° i r~…ĺabii mańßapinaŇč mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp ku akuti Ē~ °, k…ô-s-mu par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad saisasaaj a r~…ĺańßud a didi Ē~ ° ku akuti Ē~ °. k…ô-s-mu iza ku su-tan satabakiaj a pańßikukia. nu su-tanaj a pibańß…ôr~…ĺan nu aŇčaŇčan a kasaupuan kar~…ĺiwsasakan a kitizaan. naujaanaj patiz…ôŇč i k…ô-s-mu nu satimur~…ĺan, nika kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu kar~…ĺamkam ka ¶akat nu tukaj atu ¶apiaj a kitizaan masatukujaj pańßikukian mar~…ĺa u aŇčaŇčan tu nu i ¶iba. bar~…ĺuńßaj kanatar~…ĺ a pińßikukian imańßini i …ôn-tu-man a nipatiz…ôŇčan. a mikutaj ¶iniza tu nu ajzaaj a k…ô-s-mu kanatar~…ĺ a pańßikukian mar~…ĺa nu su-tan nu satabakiaj a pańßikukian. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ke-s-mu "A-la-pow a kamu ōßŔĄōģōĪō∑ŔąŔÖ‚Äé al-KharŠĻ≠Ňęm, kamu nipabelin Ke-s-mu" nu Su-tan kung-hee-kow a angangan. makayzaay U-kan-taay a Ni-low-he atu makayzaan I-su-pi-yaay a Cin-ni-low-he itini a makakutay, pasayamis belud pasay Ay-ci atu mulaliw micumud tu Ti-cong-hey. "Ke-s-mu" cacay ku kamu u imi zu a cihek. Ke-s-mu a kitizaan iza ku100 emang ku muenengay nu tademaw, micapi tu saamisan nu Ke-s-mu atu En-tu-man a nisakaput nu tabakiay a tukay u tademaw hakay macaliway tu 400 a emang. likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Ke-s-mu i 1821 a mihcaan u Ay-ci atu Mu-han-mu-te.A-li-pow-sya patizeng tu tukay, mala nu Ay-ci a hitay a katukuhan. nika zikuz balaki pasu tubang patahkal kitizaan sapisiwbaynu angangan. 1884 a mihca 3 a bulad 13 a dimiad, paicelang tu Mu-han-mu-te.Ay-ha-man-te.Ma-he-ti sakaput a hitay mitaliyuk tu nu Ing-kow sakakaay nu mikeliday ci Ca-li.cyaw-ce.ke-ten mikelid mipupu tu hitay, zikuz sakay tiniay a tukay nu Ing-Ay pulung nu hitay sebek amipatay. 1885 a mihca 1 a bulad 26 a ddimiad, mapelpelay a Ke-s-mu mangayaw. zikuz I 1898 a mihca 9 a bulad 2 adimiad, ci He-pow-te.Ci-ci-le mikelid tu Ing a hitay mademe t uku misebengay nu Ma-he-ti-pay a hitay. 1885ŚĻī1śúą26śó•, . 1899 a mihcaan, Ke-s-mu mala nu Ing-Ay-Su-tan angangan nu tukay. i 1956 a mihcaan sateked mala nu Su-tan zikuz mala uyni angangan nu kanatal. 1899ŚĻī, . hekalŚúįÁźÜ Ke-s-mu tini i Su-tannu macelcelay nu tademaw a kakitizaan nu teban, mahamin itini a kanatal nu Walian saamisan angangan, pey-wi15 katukuh 16 tu, tung-cin 31 katukuh 32 tu. Ke-s-mu a dimiad u akuti'ay a alikelikenan, pitu a bulad atu walu a bulad taneng mahapinang maazih ku kasinanum. Ke-s-mu palalecad paymihcaan kasinanum macaliway ku 155 haw-mi. tini I mihcaan palalecad tu bali nu akuti', Ke-s-mu u sataledesay nu tabakiay a tukay. kalaludan akuti' hakay a macaliway ku 53ňöC "127ňöF". mihcaan palalecad satalakaway akuti' nu lahud 37.1ňöC "99ňöF". namahiza nayay ku cacanan palalecad tu nu buladay a akuti' isasa tu 30ňöC "86ňöF". uyni caay henay kaazih zumaay angangan akuti' ku likelikenan demiad nu tukay Li-ya-te, Pa-ke-ta-atu Bung-hwang a tukay mahiniay. u akuti' i labii mahapinang maselep ku akuti', Ke-s-mu palalecad saisasaay a lahud a didi' ku akuti'. Ke-s-mu iza ku Su-tan satabakiay a pahikukia. nu Su-tanay a pibahelan nu angangan a kasaupuan kaliwsasakan a kitizaan. nauyaanay patizeng i Ke-s-mu nu satimulan, nika kilul tu kalamkam kacakat nu tukay atu capiay a kitizaan masatukuyay pahikukian mala u angangan tu nu iciba. baluhay kanatal a pihikukian imahini i En-tu-man a nipatizengan. a mikutay ciniza tu nu ayzaay a Ke-s-mu kanatal a pahikukian mala nu Su-tan nu satabakiay a pahikukian. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

"k…ô-s-mu" ¶a ¶aj ku kamu u imi zu a ¶ińß…ôk. k…ô-s-mu a kitizaan iza ku*** …ômaŇč ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj nu tad…ômaw, mi ¶api tu saamisan nu k…ô-s-mu atu …ôn-tu-man a nisakaput nu tabakiaj a tukaj u tad…ômaw bar~…ĺaki pasu tubaŇč patańßkar~…ĺ kitizaan sapisiwbajnu aŇčaŇčan. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a dimiad, pai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu mu-ńßan-mu-t…ô.aj-ńßa-man-t…ô.ma-ńß…ô-ti sakaput a ńßitaj mitar~…ĺijuk tu nu iŇč-kow sakakaaj nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj ¶i ¶a-r~…ĺi. ¶jaw- ¶…ô.k…ô-t…ôn mik…ôr~…ĺid mipupu tu ńßitaj, zikuz sakaj tiniaj a tukaj nu iŇč-aj pur~…ĺuŇč nu ńßitaj s…ôb…ôk amipataj. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a ddimiad, map…ôr~…ĺp…ôr~…ĺaj a k…ô-s-mu maŇčajaw. zikuz i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * adimiad, ¶i ńß…ô-pow-t…ô. ¶i- ¶i-r~…ĺ…ô mik…ôr~…ĺid tu iŇč a ńßitaj mad…ôm…ô t uku mis…ôb…ôŇčaj nu ma-ńß…ô-ti-paj a ńßitaj. **********, . **** a mińß ¶aan, k…ô-s-mu mar~…ĺa nu iŇč-aj-su-tan aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj. i **** a mińß ¶aan sat…ôk…ôd mar~…ĺa nu su-tan zikuz mar~…ĺa ujni aŇčaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ. *****, . ńß…ôkar~…ĺ** k…ô-s-mu tini i su-tannu ma ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺaj nu tad…ômaw a kakitizaan nu t…ôban, mańßamin itini a kanatar~…ĺ nu war~…ĺian saamisan aŇčaŇčan, p…ô-wi** katukuńß ** tu, tuŇč- ¶in ** katukuńß ** tu. k…ô-s-mu a dimiad u akuti Ē~ °aj a ar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan, pitu a bur~…ĺad atu war~…ĺu a bur~…ĺad tan…ôŇč mańßapinaŇč maazińß ku kasinanum. k…ô-s-mu par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad pajmińß ¶aan kasinanum ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ku *** ńßaw-mi. tini i mińß ¶aan par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu bar~…ĺi nu akuti Ē~ °, k…ô-s-mu u satar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj nu tabakiaj a tukaj. kar~…ĺar~…ĺudan akuti Ē~ ° ńßakaj a ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ku *** ¶ "****f". mińß ¶aan par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad satar~…ĺakawaj akuti Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺańßud **.** ¶ "***f". namańßiza najaj ku ¶a ¶anan par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu nu bur~…ĺadaj a akuti Ē~ ° isasa tu *** ¶ "***f". ujni ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kaazińß zumaaj aŇčaŇčan akuti Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan d…ômiad nu tukaj r~…ĺi-ja-t…ô, pa-k…ô-ta-atu buŇč-ńßwaŇč a tukaj mańßiniaj. u akuti Ē~ ° i r~…ĺabii mańßapinaŇč mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp ku akuti Ē~ °, k…ô-s-mu par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad saisasaaj a r~…ĺańßud a didi Ē~ ° ku akuti Ē~ °. k…ô-s-mu iza ku su-tan satabakiaj a pańßikukia. nu su-tanaj a pibańß…ôr~…ĺan nu aŇčaŇčan a kasaupuan kar~…ĺiwsasakan a kitizaan. naujaanaj patiz…ôŇč i k…ô-s-mu nu satimur~…ĺan, nika kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu kar~…ĺamkam ka ¶akat nu tukaj atu ¶apiaj a kitizaan masatukujaj pańßikukian mar~…ĺa u aŇčaŇčan tu nu i ¶iba. bar~…ĺuńßaj kanatar~…ĺ a pińßikukian imańßini i …ôn-tu-man a nipatiz…ôŇčan. a mikutaj ¶iniza tu nu ajzaaj a k…ô-s-mu kanatar~…ĺ a pańßikukian mar~…ĺa nu su-tan nu satabakiaj a pańßikukian. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
